name: Y/N and CEO at generic company name
description:
Y/N and CEO at generic company name is a fun action packed adventure that takes place at, you guessed it, generic company name that is ruled over by alpha/dominant/ sigma/ tall/ handsome/ aggressive but secretly kind but only to Y/N, CEO.

You are a worker there, and so are your friends.
_________________________

Based off of those tiktoks about Y/N and CEO, and the image was made by the wonderful and cool and awesome Weeweepiss on tiktok.
